name: YouTube Data
description: Search YouTube videos, fetch video/channel metadata and list a channel's latest uploads. Search/metadata only — does NOT download transcripts or videos.

credentials_required.label: YouTube Data API v3 Key
credentials_required.hint: Create in Google Cloud Console: Enable YouTube Data API v3, then Credentials → API Key. Free quota: 10,000 units/day. search_videos costs 100 units per call, others 1 unit.

tools.name: search_videos
tools.description: Search YouTube for videos by keyword (costs 100 units/call)

tools.name: get_video
tools.description: Get video metadata (title, stats, duration, description) by video ID

tools.name: get_channel
tools.description: Get channel profile and stats by channel ID or @handle

tools.name: list_channel_videos
tools.description: List a channel's most recent uploads (by channel ID or @handle)

author: freddy-schuetz
